pauli_matrix_x.name: Pauli Matrix sigma_x
pauli_matrix_x.description: sigma_x, the Pauli spin matrix for the x-component. Eigenvalues +1 and -1.
pauli_matrix_x.search_text: Pauli matrix sigma x spin operator x component two-level system qubit SU(2) generator spin-1/2 spinor

pauli_matrix_y.name: Pauli Matrix sigma_y
pauli_matrix_y.description: sigma_y, the Pauli spin matrix for the y-component. Eigenvalues +1 and -1.
pauli_matrix_y.search_text: Pauli matrix sigma y spin operator y component imaginary antisymmetric two-level system SU(2) generator spin-1/2

pauli_matrix_z.name: Pauli Matrix sigma_z
pauli_matrix_z.description: sigma_z, the Pauli spin matrix for the z-component. Eigenvalues +1 and -1.
pauli_matrix_z.search_text: Pauli matrix sigma z spin operator z component diagonal measurement basis computational basis spin up spin down qubit

spin_squared_eigenvalue.name: Spin Angular Momentum Squared Eigenvalue
spin_squared_eigenvalue.description: Eigenvalue of S^2: hbar^2 s(s+1). For electrons, s = 1/2 gives S^2 = (3/4) hbar^2.
spin_squared_eigenvalue.search_text: Spin angular momentum squared eigenvalue S squared intrinsic spin quantum number half-integer fermion boson total spin

spin_z_eigenvalue.name: Spin z-component Eigenvalue
spin_z_eigenvalue.description: Eigenvalue of S_z: hbar * m_s, where m_s = -s, -s+1, ..., s-1, s. For electrons, m_s = +/- 1/2.
spin_z_eigenvalue.search_text: Spin z component eigenvalue magnetic spin quantum number m_s projection spin up down Stern-Gerlach measurement

zeeman_energy.name: Zeeman Effect Energy Shift
zeeman_energy.description: E_Zeeman = -mu_B * g_J * m_j * B, energy shift in a uniform magnetic field B. g_J is the Lande g-factor, mu_B the Bohr magneton.
zeeman_energy.search_text: Zeeman effect energy shift magnetic field splitting Lande g-factor Bohr magneton spectral line splitting anomalous normal Zeeman m_j

larmor_frequency.name: Larmor Precession Frequency
larmor_frequency.description: omega_L = eB/(2m_e), the Larmor frequency at which a magnetic moment precesses around an external magnetic field.
larmor_frequency.search_text: Larmor precession frequency magnetic moment gyroscope spin precession cyclotron magnetic field electron gyromagnetic ratio NMR MRI

spin_orbit_coupling.name: Spin-Orbit Coupling Energy
spin_orbit_coupling.description: E_SO = (A/2)[j(j+1) - l(l+1) - s(s+1)], the spin-orbit interaction energy. A_so is the spin-orbit coupling constant.
spin_orbit_coupling.search_text: Spin-orbit coupling interaction energy fine structure LS coupling total angular momentum j quantum number relativistic correction Thomas precession spectral doublet
